title: Vaupelia barbata
taxonomy: Vaupelia barbata is a plant species classified within the family Vaupeliaceae. This plant belongs to the order Diaporthales and the class Ascomycota. Further, it is classified as a fungus, more specifically a type of ascomycete. The species Vaupelia barbata is also known for being a member of the genus Vaupelia. Its classification is based on characteristics such as its fungal morphology and reproductive structures.
